query:
SELECT sst.assignment_id AS "assignment_id!: i64",
                  a.student_id AS "student_id!: i64",
                  a.syllabus_id AS "syllabus_id!: i64"
           FROM student_syllabus_techniques sst
           JOIN syllabus_assignments a ON a.id = sst.assignment_id
           WHERE sst.id = ?
